zh.Mortagne-sur-Sevre (Pays de la Loire, Fr: 法國波代莫塔尼-素-瑟艾福
zh.Oost-Souburg, 4388, Nederland: 荷蘭藍德福利辛根奧斯吉素包格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne於大約1220年出生在比利時海瑙特圖爾奈時，他的父親Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai31歲，母親Isabelle d'Enghien24歲。他和Yolande de Coucy至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1267年5月之前。

zh-hans.Mortagne-sur-Sevre (Pays de la Loire, Fr: 法国波代莫塔尼-素-瑟艾福
zh-hans.Oost-Souburg, 4388, Nederland: 荷兰藍德福利辛根奧斯吉素包格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne于大约1220年出生在比利时海瑙特圖爾奈时，他的父亲Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai31岁，母亲Isabelle d'Enghien24岁。他和Yolande de Coucy至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1267年5月之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francoise, Herve, Marcel, Philippe, Pierre.

French: topographic name for someone who lived on or near a hill, from Old French montaine ‘hill, (small) mountain’; or a habitational name from any of several places called (La) Montagne, named with the same word.

variants.name: Mountain
meanings: English (Yorkshire; of Norman origin): topographic name from Middle English mountaine ‘mountain’ (Old French montagne). See Montagne .
Irish: either of Norman origin, as 1 above, or a variant of   Manton  .

English: variant of Monkton a habitational name from Monkton (Kent, Somerset), Moor Monkton and Nun Monkton (Yorkshire), Bishop Monkton (Yorkshire), or any of numerous other places called Monkton, named with Old English munuc ‘monk’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Lamontagne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Marcel, Emile, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Normand, Gaston, Ovide, Achille.
habitational name for someone from any of several places called La Montagne, or a variant of the topographic name Montagne 1, with fused feminine definite article la.

nameMeanings.name: Arnould
meanings: Saxon, Latin: Faithful to his honour; help in war, helping lord; powerful lord.

en.lifeSummary: When Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne was born about 1220, in Tournai, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai, was 31 and his mother, Isabelle d'Enghien, was 24. He had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Yolande de Coucy. He died before May 1267.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne est né environ 1220, à Tournai, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabelle d'Enghien, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Yolande de Coucy. Il est décédé avant mai 1267.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne um 1220 in Tournai, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai 31 und seine Mutter Isabelle d'Enghien 24. Er hatte mit Yolande de Coucy mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb vor Mai 1267.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne è nato il circa 1220 nel Tournai, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle d'Enghien, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Yolande de Coucy. Morì prima del maggio 1267.

ja.Tournai, Hainaut, Belgium: ベルギーヘイナトトウルナイ
ja.Mortagne-sur-Sevre (Pays de la Loire, Fr: フランスベンドeモータグネ-スル-スevア

ja.Oost-Souburg, 4388, Nederland: オランダゼエランドvリシンジェンオオスト-ソウブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Chevalier Arnould de Mortagneが約1220年にベルギーヘイナトトウルナイで生まれた時，父Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournaiは31歳，母Isabelle d'Enghienは24歳であった。彼はYolande de Coucyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1267年5月以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne(이)가 대략 1220년 벨기에 하인오트 토우른아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle d'Enghien(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Yolande de Coucy(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1267년 5월 이전 사망했다.

mn.about 1220–before May 1267: ойролцоогоор 1220 он–1267 оны Тавдугаар сараас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle d'Enghien, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Yolande de Coucy. Ele faleceu antes maio de 1267.

ro.Oost-Souburg, 4388, Nederland: Oost-Souburg, Vlissingen, Zeeland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne родился около 1220 г. в местности тоурнеи, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabelle d'Enghien, 24. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Yolande de Coucy. Он умер перед май 1267 г.

sm.about 1220–before May 1267: e tusa o le 1220–a'e le'I oo le Me 1267

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne nació aproximadamente 1220, en Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabelle d'Enghien, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Yolande de Coucy. Murió antes de mayo de 1267.
